<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Removal; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\FuncCall; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Expression; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Nop; class RemoveFunctionCall extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Removal'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Removes a function call'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' foo(); // [tl! remove] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Expression::class]; } #[\Override] public static function can(Node $node): bool { if (! $node instanceof Expression) { return false; } return $node->expr instanceof FuncCall; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { return new Nop; } }
